Petition For Order Directing Trustee To Return Trust Assets To Beneficiary; For Accounting; For Surcharge; For Damages; For Costs And Attorney Fees And Sanctions For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty

Petition For Order Directing Trustee To Return Trust Assets To Beneficiary; For Accounting; For Surcharge; For Damages; For Costs And Attorney Fees And Sanctions For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty
Off Calendar Oct-03-2014 Continued To Nov-07-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Directing Trustee To Return Trust Assets To Beneficiary; For Accounting; For Surcharge; For Damages; For Costs And Attorney Fees And Sanctions For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty
Off Calendar Aug-20-2014 Continued To Oct-03-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Hansen for and with Lisa Giovannini.

Ms. Hansen stated that Mr. Giovannini did not appear at the settlement conference. Ms. Giovannini stated that she has had no contact with her Brother. Discussion was held as to how to proceed, whether the petition will be amended to request an accounting, what the terms of the settlement agreement are, etc. Ms. Hansen explained that this is an 850 Petition and that she was told at the ex parte hearing that she needed to file it. The Petition for Order Directing Trustee to Return Trust Assets to Beneficiary, etc. was set for trial on October 3, 2014 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Hansen will amend her petition. The Court will issue a notice of trial.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Directing Trustee To Return Trust Assets To Beneficiary; For Accounting; For Surcharge; For Damages; For Costs And Attorney Fees And Sanctions For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty
Off Calendar Jul-18-2014 Continued To Aug-20-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2014 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Directing Trustee To Return Trust Assets To Beneficiary; For Accounting; For Surcharge; For Damages; For Costs And Attorney Fees And Sanctions For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Continued To Jul-30-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Hansen for and with Lisa Giovanini. Mitchell Giovanini in Propria Persona.

Ms. Hansen stated that she filed a supplement on November 25, 2013 requesting an accounting. Mr. Mitchell stated that he did the best he could with the accounting and that he used some of Lisa's money for maintenance of the property. The Parties were asked to step out of the courtroom to review the accounting. Upon returning, Ms. Hansen stated that they were not satisfied with what was presented, that the expenses are not appropriate and requested a formal accounting. The Court suggested Ms. Hansen review what was presented and send a letter to Mr. Mitchell as to what she thinks is owed to her Client, continuing the matter for 60-days and setting a settlement conference. The Petition for Order Directing Trustee to Return Trust Assets to Beneficiary, etc. was continued to July 30, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will send notice as to the date, time and place of the settlement conference.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Directing Trustee To Return Trust Assets To Beneficiary; For Accounting; For Surcharge; For Damages; For Costs And Attorney Fees And Sanctions For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty
Off Calendar Jan-14-2014 Continued To Feb-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Elizabeth Hansen for and with Lisa Giovannini (Petitioner).

Ms. Hansen reported that they have been paid only half of the settlement, that they received $79,000.00 out of $141,000.00 and that they received no response from the Trustee. The Court indicated that settlement agreement under 664.6 can be subject to a Petition to Enforce Settlement Agreement. Ms. Hansen stated that she has the escrow statement showing the net and the she is requesting for an accounting. The Court stated that an 850 Petition requires personal service and that the Court will review the authority and issue an interim order. The matter was continued to February 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with an Order for an accounting to be filed by February 20, 2013.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. Not Reported.

Petition For Removal Of Co-Trustee And Confirmation Of Remaining Trustee; Ect.
Off Calendar Jul-17-2012 Continued To Oct-12-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sean Miller for Mitchell Giovannini. Elizabeth Hansen for and with Lisa Giovannini (Respondent).

Counsel reported that they selected a Mediator, that access to the property was denied, that there was a physical altercation and that a restraining order was issued last week. The Petition for Removal of Co-Trustee and Confirmation of Remaining Trustee, etc. was set for two half day trials on Ocotber 12, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. and October 19, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

Petition For Removal Of Co-Trustee And Confirmation Of Remaining Trustee; Ect.
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Continued To Jul-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Hansen for and with Lisa Giovannini (Respondent). Sean Miller for Mitchell Giovannini (Petitioner).

Ms. Hansen stated that her Client has not been living in the property since the Father died, that it is completly empty and that her Client is cleaning up the property. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation (order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation signed in open Court). Mediation is to be completed by July 13, 2012. The Parties are to report to the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by July 13, 2012. The Petition for Removal of Co-Trustee, etc. was continued to July 17, 2012 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
